description: Update node-install.sh with wireguard-tools dependency, logrotate config deployment, /var/log/openvpn/ directory creation, and add node-agent logrotate config
steps: 1. In node-install.sh, add wireguard-tools to the dependency installation lists for both Debian/Ubuntu (apt-get install line) and RHEL/CentOS/Fedora (dnf install line). Add it alongside the existing VPN packages (openvpn easy-rsa strongswan xl2tpd).

2. In node-install.sh, after the 'VPN scripts' section that copies OpenVPN scripts, add a new section '# Log rotation' that: (a) creates /var/log/openvpn/ with permissions 0750 and root:root ownership using mkdir -p and chmod/chown, (b) copies scripts/logrotate/koris-openvpn from $INSTALL_DIR to /etc/logrotate.d/koris-openvpn with chmod 644.

3. In scripts/logrotate/, create koris-node-agent logrotate config for /var/log/panel-node/*.log with daily rotation, 7 days retention, compress, delaycompress, missingok, notifempty, create 0640 root root, and postrotate that does systemctl reload node-agent 2>/dev/null || true.

4. In node-install.sh, in the same log rotation section, also copy koris-node-agent logrotate config to /etc/logrotate.d/koris-node-agent and create /var/log/panel-node/ directory with 0750 permissions.
acceptance_criteria: node-install.sh contains wireguard-tools in both apt-get and dnf install commands
node-install.sh copies node agent logrotate config to /etc/logrotate.d/koris-node-agent
scripts/logrotate/koris-node-agent file exists with proper logrotate syntax
findings: All acceptance criteria met. bash -n passes, wireguard-tools in both apt-get and dnf lines, log rotation section with directories and config deployment added between VPN scripts and Service blocks, koris-node-agent logrotate config created.
